zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher Barnewall於1390年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾艾利蘭時，他的父親Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight21歲，母親Eleanor Rochford21歲。他於1422年之前與Matilda Drake在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1408年被列為serjeant at law。他去世於1446年10月12日在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher Barnewall于1390年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾艾利蘭时，他的父亲Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight21岁，母亲Eleanor Rochford21岁。他于1422年之前与Matilda Drake在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1408年被列为serjeant at law。他去世于1446年10月12日在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barnewall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Barnwell
meanings: English (Warwickshire): habitational name from a place so called in Cambridgeshire and another in Northamptonshire, both named with Old English beorn ‘warrior’ (genitive plural beorna) or the Old English personal name Beorna + well(a) ‘stream’.

Irish (Dublin, Meath): of English origin (the same as 1 above). Sir Michael de Berneval or de Barneval took part in Strongbow's expedition to Ireland in 1172. He first held land in Berehavan, Cork, before the main landing in Leinster. The English surname was Gaelicized as de Bearnabhal.
History: A John Barnwell (c. 1671–1724) emigrated to SC from Ireland at the end of the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher Barnewall was born in 1390, in Ireland, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight, was 21 and his mother, Eleanor Rochford, was 21. He married Matilda Drake before 1422, in Trim, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1408, at the age of 18, his occupation is listed as serjeant at law. He died on 12 October 1446, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher Barnewall est né en 1390, à Ireland, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Rochford, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Drake avant 1422, à Trim, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1408, à l’âge de 18 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est serjeant at law. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1446, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher Barnewall 1390 in Ireland, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight 21 und seine Mutter Eleanor Rochford 21. Er hat vor 1422 in Trim, County Meath, Irland Matilda Drake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1408, als er 18 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als serjeant at law aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1446 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Barnewall è nato il nel 1390 nel Ireland, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Rochford, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Drake prima del 1422, nel Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1408, all'età di 18 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come serjeant at law. Morì il 12 ottobre 1446, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christopher Barnewallが1390年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアアイレランドで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knightは21歳，母Eleanor Rochfordは21歳であった。1422年以前にアイルランドコウントイ メアストリムでMatilda Drakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1408年，18歳の時，職業はserjeant at lawと記録されている。彼は1446年10月12日に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher Barnewall(이)가 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 이렐랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Rochford(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1422년 이전 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림에서 Matilda Drake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1408년, 18세의 나이로 그의 직업은 serjeant at law이었다. 그는 1446년 10월 12일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Barnewall nasceu em 1390, em Ireland, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Rochford, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Drake antes 1422, em Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1408, com 18 anos, sua profissão aparece como serjeant at law. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1446, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher Barnewall родился в 1390 г. в местности иреланд, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Rochford, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Drake перед 1422 г. в местности трим, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1408 году, в возрасте 18 лет,  он работал по профессии serjeant at law. Он умер 12 октября 1446 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christopher Barnewall nació en 1390, en Ireland, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Christopher de Berneval I, Knight, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Eleanor Rochford, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Matilda Drake antes de 1422, en Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1408, a la edad de 18 años, su ocupación registrada era serjeant at law. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1446, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
